_meta.purpose: SuperAdmin → Enterprise Command Center: full screen/route/api/table inventory (Step 1 discovery).
_meta.source: frontend nav config (useAdminDashboardState.tsx) + SuperAdminDashboard switch + per-panel /api grep + grounded against 1305 live DB tables.
honesty_notes: usage_frequency is a STRUCTURAL ESTIMATE by nav placement — there is NO runtime usage telemetry in the platform. Do not read these as measured numbers.

api[] is grep-derived from each panel file (real). table[] is a best-effort namespace inference from the dominant API prefix, validated to exist among the 1305 live tables; empty [] means no confident mapping (see dependency map).
Some screens share a panel component or render multiple components; panel_component shows the primary.
_meta.table_count_caveat: Table counts labelled code_defined_tables are pgTable/CREATE TABLE definitions across the backend (1305). The live dev DB currently materializes only 167 tables (most are created lazily via ensure*Schema on first feature use). Namespace table_counts in this file are code-defined, NOT live row presence.
